rationale: Duplicate of S-0002-03 (ServiceNow lab provisioning). Both target the same WorkArena++ environment provisioning step — keep S-0002-03 as canonical and reject S-0003-02 to clear the duplicate from the high-priority backlog. The proxy-benchmark relabel handled by t0015 unblocks the immediate Phase 2 reporting need; native WorkArena++ provisioning remains tracked under S-0002-03.
